Merge pull request #114177 from KoBeWi/impossible

Fix changing directory in FileDialog

closed_issues.summary: FileDialog wrong relative path when trying to export project

description.text:
### Tested versions

Reproducible in: v4.6.beta1.official [d743736f8]
Not reproducible in: v4.6.dev4.official [bd2ca13c6]

### System information

Godot v4.6.beta1.mono - EndeavourOS #1 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Mon, 24 Nov 2025 15:21:09 +0000 on Wayland - X11 display driver, Multi-window, 1 monitor - Vulkan (Forward+) - dedicated AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT (RADV NAVI21) - AMD Ryzen 5 9600X 6-Core Processor (12 threads) - 60.40 GiB memory

### Issue description

The export path file dialogue inserts wrong a relative path in the path selector, to exemplify this, I've attached a gif.
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/46f2d597-011c-4198-a9af-821a1152cca2)
This is how it looks without the bug:
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/62b15e1d-a540-4d48-8c66-377d249a4d3f)

### Steps to reproduce

1. Make a new godot project (or use one)
2. Open the export game dialogue
3. Add any kind of preset
4. Select a export path
5. Open and close the export path chooser various times, see how it adds a extra path

### Minimal reproduction project (MRP)

N/A
